name: Duluth Entertainment Convention Center (DECC)
google_maps_query: Duluth Entertainment Convention Center, 350 Harbor Drive, Duluth, MN 55802
routing_query: Duluth Entertainment Convention Center, 350 Harbor Drive, Duluth, MN 55802
google_query_note: Uses the stable official DECC venue address for Google routing/marker placement. Follow the loading instructions and official PDF for the North Gate/Railroad Street loading zone.
loading_instructions: Buses load in front of the North gate along Railroad Street.
parking_info: Parking is available in the DECC parking ramp and lot for $10 per day.
best_for: Participants staying in Canal Park, Park Point, downtown Duluth, and areas just west of downtown Duluth.
access_notes: This can be one of the most congested loading sites, but it is the only listed site that allows you to park within walking distance of the finish line.
coordinate_note: Pin uses the official Google Maps place coordinate linked from the race transportation page; check the loading site map for the exact race-morning loading zone.

name: Kirby Student Center
google_maps_query: Kirby Student Center 1120 Kirby Drive Duluth MN 55812
routing_query: Kirby Student Center, 1120 Kirby Drive, Duluth, MN 55812
google_query_note: Google query uses the campus building name and address.
loading_instructions: Buses load near the Kirby Student Center on the University of Minnesota Duluth campus.
parking_info: Parking is available in campus lots via University Drive.
best_for: Participants staying in Woodland, Kenwood, and Hillside neighborhoods; also a good downtown alternative to DECC.
coordinate_note: Pin uses the official Google Maps place coordinate linked from the race transportation page; check the loading site map for the exact race-morning loading zone.

name: Miller Hill Mall
google_maps_query: JCPenney Miller Hill Mall 1600 Miller Trunk Highway Duluth MN 55811
routing_query: JCPenney Miller Hill Mall, 1600 Miller Trunk Highway, Duluth, MN 55811
google_query_note: Google query aims for the JC Penney side of Miller Hill Mall, matching the loading note.
loading_instructions: Buses load in the parking lot near JC Penney.
parking_info: Parking is available in marked areas of the mall parking lot. No race parking is allowed in areas shaded red on the official map.
best_for: Participants near Miller Hill Mall, Duluth Heights, Piedmont, Hermantown, and locations north of Duluth on Highways 2 and 53.

name: Duluth East High School
google_maps_query: Duluth East High School 301 North 40th Avenue East Duluth MN 55804
routing_query: Duluth East High School, 301 North 40th Avenue East, Duluth, MN 55804
google_query_note: Google query uses the school name and address; check official loading map for the exact lot/entrance.
loading_instructions: Buses load in the parking lot near the main entrance to the school.
parking_info: Parking is available in the school lots via N. 40th Avenue East.
best_for: Participants coming from the east side of Duluth, including parts of downtown and the London Road corridor. Closest listed location to the Garry Bjorklund Half Marathon start.
access_notes: London Road closes at 5:30 a.m.; after that, access this site using Superior Street.
coordinate_note: Pin uses the official Google Maps place coordinate linked from the race transportation page; check the loading site map for the exact race-morning loading zone.
